name: Meatballs for Spaghetti I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beef, bread crumbs, garlic, parsley, basil, egg, and pepper in a large bowl. Mix thoroughly and shape into balls about 1 inch in diameter.
2. Melt the oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Brown the meatballs on all sides, turning occasionally until browned evenly. Remove from the pan and set aside.
3. Add tomato sauce to the pan and stir to combine. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover and cook for 40 minutes, or until the meatballs are cooked through.
4. Serve the meatballs over spaghetti.
